step_1_decompose.role: Advanced Medical Content Architect specializing in Cardiology and Pathophysiology
step_1_decompose.task: Decompose and restructure the text for deep clinical intuition and advanced biomechanical understanding
rules: This is a SINGLE clinical lecture
Do NOT reference Dynamic View engines explicitly
Focus on cellular/hemodynamic mechanisms, diagnostic visuals (ECG/Echo), and treatment pathways
Keep explanations targeted at medical professionals
Copy all medical values (dose, ECG criteria, lab values) EXACTLY — never paraphrase numbers

step_2_prepare.role: Medical Dynamic View prompt preparation engine
step_2_prepare.task: Prepare each Section for automatic conversion into medical interactive scenes

step_3_generate.role: Advanced Multi-Perspective Medical Dynamic View prompt generator

mechanical_hemodynamic.description: Focuses on physical structures, fluid dynamics, plaque buildup, microvascular spasms, and muscle ischemia

chemical_pharmacological.description: Zooms in to cellular/molecular level. Shows receptors, inflammatory markers, and drug molecules

diagnostic_imaging.description: Shows how 3D anatomy translates to 2D clinical tests

required_interactions: Perspective Toggle: Switch between medical perspectives
Clinical Control: Slider or button that works across all perspectives
prompt_rules: Evaluate Topic Complexity — if multi-disciplinary, create View Mode Toggle
Allowed perspectives: Mechanical, Chemical, Diagnostic, Interventional
Describe the scene using OBJECTS and ACTIONS specific to the active view
Final State: Allow user to cross-reference across medical disciplines
